content:
感谢各位守密人的支持！
《忘却前夜》OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时 已发布，欢迎收听、下载及分享。
如果有基于OST的二次创作，也欢迎分享给我们！（二创请遵照同人规则，OST内容请勿商用）

**忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时**
迷雾总有消散之时。
彼时，响彻于雾霭里的惨叫会消散，流淌在祭坛上的血迹会被拭净。
迷途的灵魂将得到解脱，找到正确的路途——
前往闪耀的繁星，或留存于真实的大地。

作曲：Starlinear Records/F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Remix：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
企划：B.I.A.V. Studio

——◆——◆—— ◆◆◆ ——◆——◆——

Thank you for your support!

Morimens OST: "Mouchette EP: When the Mist Clears" was released today. 
Welcome everyone to listen, download and share. If you have secondary creations based on the OST, please also share them with us!
 (Please follow the rules of the fandom for secondary creations, and do not use the OST content for commercial purposes)

**Morimens OST: Mouchette EP: When the Mist Clears**
Every mist must one day lift. 
When it does, the cries that once pierced the fog will fall silent, and the blood on the altar will be washed away. 
Long-lost souls will find their rest, guided at last to their true path—whether toward the shimmering stars or the solid earth below.

Project: B.I.A.V. Studio
Composer: Starlinear Records/F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
Remix：F.R.K./ B.I.A.V. Studio
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时

content:
**01. 揭开新世界的迷雾-Unveiling a New World-**

茉夏早已习惯了迷雾的存在。
无论是多么难缠的迷雾，多么危险的迷雾，她总能从其中平安走出。
这次也一样。
她终会走出新世界的迷雾，回到属于自己的维度。
无论要付出怎样的代价。

Mouchette has long grown used to the mist.
No mist, however how thick or lethal, has ever stopped her.
This time will be no different.
She will walk out of the mist of this new world and return to her own... whatever the cost might be.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时

content:
**02. 繁星闪耀之地-Where the Stars Abide-**

亘古的繁星见证了世界的诞育、成长与繁荣，它也必将见证世界的终结。
渴求生存的人们啊，存活的唯一方法，并不在我们的脚下，并不在背叛我们的大地上，而在我们的头顶，那永恒的繁星闪耀之地。

The ancient stars have seen worlds begin, thrive, and fade. Inevitably, they will watch them end, too.
For those who want to survive: salvation isn't found in the dirt or on this treacherous earth. Look up. It lies in the reach of the stars, in that everlasting realm.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时

content:
**03. 信念的争锋-Clash of Beliefs-**

宇宙孕育了世界，世界孕育了生命。而不同世界的生命，又孕育出了不同的规则与理念。
当他们交锋时，厮杀的从来都不止是两个躯体，两个意志，两个生命。
那是永恒平行又突然相交的、两个宇宙的碰撞。

The cosmos birthed worlds; worlds birthed life; life birthed divergent laws and beliefs.
When these lives collide, it is never a simple trial of strength or will. 
It is the collision of two universes—eternally parallel, yet forced to intersect.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时

content:
**04. 残酷的生存智慧-Cruel Survival Wisdom-**

残酷的世界下，一个人的灵魂轻易便可焚烧殆尽。
于是我们向他人和世界求索，亲情，爱情，友情，思乡之情……
那触摸不到的感情，就此化为不可看见的力量，延续着的生命，让人们在这个世界燃烧得久一些，更久一些……

In a cruel world, a single soul can burn to ash in an instant.
So we look to others for help: to family, love, and memory. These bonds become a quiet strength that keeps us going—letting us burn a little longer in this world.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时

content:
**05. 无法理解的选择-Incomprehensible Choice-**

拯救世界不是她的风格，而这里，也不是她的世界。
但她听到了守密人的声音，看到了守密人为了拯救世界做出的巨大牺牲。
被人拼尽性命守护的世界，不该毁灭。
至少在这一刻，不该由她亲自毁灭。

Saving the world is never her way, and this is not her world to save.
But she heard the Keeper’s voice and saw what was sacrificed to save this place. A world someone gave their life for shouldn't be destroyed.
At least not now. And certainly not by her own hand.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时

content:
**06. 雾语者的新生-Rebirth in the Mist-**

任务结束后，我将与过去的自己道别。
道别那些熟悉又回不去的过往，道别泰穆兰和身为人类时期的自己。
我将怀念那充满迷雾的世界。
此后，我将以新的身份，存活于这迷雾消散的世界，这充满趣味的恐怖世界。

When the mission ends, I will part with my old self.
Goodbye to the past I can never go back to. To Temurahn, to the human I once was. I will mist that mist-shrouded place.
I’ll start over here, where the mist is gone—in this strange, terrifying new home.
thread_title: 忘却前夜OST：茉夏EP·迷雾消散之时

content:
<:H_immerse:1426122347643146250> 以上就是本次OST的全部曲目~
The above are all the tracks of this OST~
